build.beforeBuildCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/languages dist/ && cp src/index.html src/app.js src/styles.css src/icon.svg src/favicon.ico dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri://localhost; script-src 'self' tauri://localhost 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' tauri://localhost 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; font-src 'self' tauri://localhost https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' tauri://localhost asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; media-src 'self' tauri://localhost asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' tauri://localhost ipc: tauri: http://tauri.localhost http://ipc.localhost https://tauri.localhost https://api.github.com https://github.com;
